Title: Authorizes the assessor of Nassau county to accept an application for retroactive real property tax exempt status from Ray of Hope, Inc.
Summary: Authorizes the assessor of Nassau county to accept an application for retroactive real property tax exempt status from Ray of Hope, Inc.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing the county of Nassau assessor to accept an application for a real property tax exemption from Ray of Hope, Inc.
